name: vue-vapor-recursive-bench
description: recursive-context bench fixture for Vue Vapor (3.6 vapor mode: <script setup vapor> SFCs, provide/inject shallowRef counters over a depth-10 binary tree) - exposes window.__mount/__updateRoot/__updatePartial/__partialUnmount/__partialRemount/__unmount; update ops return nextTick() (Vue has no public sync flush).
